hero.name: APEX TOOL Design
hero.subtitle: Premium Mould & Product Design Services
hero.leadDesigner: Ditty Thomas — Freelance Mould & Product Designer

profile.title: Professional Profile
highlights: Experienced freelance mould designer with expertise in injection moulds, runner and gate systems, cooling layouts, and product development.
Strong background in automotive, PVC, electrical, and industrial mould design.
Expertise in manufacturing drawings, tolerance analysis, and mould estimation.
Expert user of Siemens Unigraphics NX, SolidWorks, and AutoCAD.
Based in Kottayam, Kerala, India, providing worldwide engineering design support.

projects.title: PVC / Multi-Cavity Mould Design
projects.description: Designed complex runner, gate, and slide mechanisms for multi-cavity PVC fittings. Achieved optimal thermal flow and minimum cycle times through customized cooling layout in Siemens NX.

projects.title: High-Speed Precision Mould Design
projects.description: Constructed core-pull and slide mechanisms using SolidWorks. Designed and analyzed tolerance stack-up and cooling layouts to meet high precision automotive parts specifications.

services.title: Injection Mould Design
services.description: Complete layout designs for injection moulds, structural calculations, and mechanical assembly structures.

services.title: Product Development Support
services.description: CAD modeling support from initial napkin sketch to DFM (Design for Manufacturing) ready parts.

services.title: Runner & Gate Optimization
services.description: Calculations for sprue sizes, hot/cold runner paths, and gate positioning to optimize injection cycle parameters.

services.title: Cooling System Layout
services.description: Thermal balancing design, baffles, bubblers, and conforming lines optimization for cooling.

services.title: Core Pull & Slider Mechanisms
services.description: Complex tooling layout calculations for splits, slider angles, angle pins, hydraulic pulls, and lifters.

services.title: 2D Manufacturing Drawings
services.description: Clean 2D drafting with rigorous tolerance standards, detailed sections, annotations, and complete BOM lists.

services.title: Design Modification & Troubleshooting
services.description: Defective mould troubleshooting, flashing issues resolution, cooling improvements, and direct engineering contract support.

contact.title: Let's build your next tool together
contact.description: Submit your product concepts, rough sketches, or modification briefs. We deliver manufacturing-ready assemblies and 2D detail sheets globally.
